design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed=hash('Book rides with AI|use_case|people who want an AI assistant to compare, book, and coordinate rides|2026-07-06T04:52:03.207640+00:00') -> selected hero=workflow-command-center, typography=Geist, components=[workflow-playbook-timeline, decision-matrix, implementation-checklist], GSAP=[pinned-chapter-scroll, hover-physics]. AIDA Check: Hero grabs attention with concrete job-to-be-done; proof and market context build interest; motion and cache reuse build desire; CTA is explicit. Font Selection: Geist for legibility. Hero Math Verification: clamp headline fits 2–3 lines at 1120px max-width. Bento Density Verification: compare-grid uses grid-auto-flow:dense. GSAP Motion Selection: guarded scroll + hover. Label Sweep & Button Check: black primary CTA, white secondary verified.
headline: Book rides with AI — compare, coordinate, and confirm with a personal agent

site_brief.audience: people who want an AI assistant to compare, book, and coordinate rides
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Target the practical query 'Book rides with AI', show the exact job-to-be-done, and explain how Super can perform the workflow with real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful. Add a long-form operator playbook with how-to steps, setup checklist, realistic limits, confirmation moments, and examples that a reader can act on immediately.
site_brief.title: Book rides with AI
site_brief.use_case_intent: show how Super can help request rides, compare ETAs, handle pickup details, and reuse repeated route preferences

summary: A practical field guide showing how Super helps people compare ETAs, request rides, manage pickup details, and reuse route preferences using real computer control and a reusable computer-use cache.
